message:
feat(mouse): register hit regions for chrome overlays and status bar (bd-iuvb.17.4)

- Status bar: register hit regions for mouse capture and a11y toggle
  labels using pre-computed x-offsets (STATUS_MOUSE_TOGGLE, STATUS_A11Y_TOGGLE)
- Help overlay: register hit regions for close (title bar) and content
  area (OVERLAY_HELP_CLOSE, OVERLAY_HELP_CONTENT)
- A11y panel: register hit region for panel dismiss (OVERLAY_A11Y)
- Dispatcher: distinguish chrome hits from pane hits — only capture
  Down/drag for overlay/status/tab; forward pane events to screens
- Dispatcher: when palette is visible, return NotConsumed so the palette
  widget handles its own mouse events
- Add STATUS_MOUSE_TOGGLE constant and handler
- Fix clippy needless-return warnings in match arms
- Add test for pane-level mouse forwarding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
